name: flow-guard logs each warning event to the friction tracker so it surfaces in /space-report friction summary
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard .claude-tdd-pro/friction && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; do printf '{"tool":"Bash","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:0%dZ"}\n' "$i" >> .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard/recent.jsonl; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/flow-guard/check.sh" --window-min 5 --threshold 5 --now 2026-05-13T00:01:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=flow-guard-warning' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
